Apptics /fortuze — Funnel Analysis

apptics.ai/fortuze → apptics-form-iclosed.vercel.app/?page=fortuze

9 Steps iClose CRM No Auto-DQ Manual Qualification
Complete Funnel Flow — Steps 0 → 9
↗
Landing Page · apptics.ai/fortuze
Scale with Apptics.
Establishes operator credibility: "$50M in revenue". Single CTA "👉 Help me Scale" + friction reducer "Takes less than 30 seconds". The form is embedded in an iframe from apptics-form-iclosed.vercel.app.
👉 Help me Scale Book A Call With The Team Framer-built landing page
1
Step 1 · Intent Check
Want a Predictable Way to Scale Your Business & MRR?
Appears to be a gate but isn't — both Yes and No advance to Step 2. Pure intent framing to put the prospect in a "scaling mindset" before the form.
✅ Yes, I want to scale → continues ❌ No, we're fine → also continues
2
Step 2 · Pain Point Mapping (Multi-Select, Skip-able)
What's holding your growth back the most right now?
Maps pain to Apptics offerings. "Next Question" always enabled — no minimum selection. Closers use selected pains to personalise their opening line on the call.
No subscriptions/MRR yet Chargebacks/failed payments Shopify/Stripe ban Need payment processing Ads don't scale profitably AOV & LTV not maximised Data/subscriber ownership Operational bottlenecks
3
Step 3 · Lead Capture — All Fields Required
Fill Out Your Info Below
"Continue" is disabled until all 4 fields are valid. International phone dial picker included. This is likely when the iClose contact record gets created.
First Name Last Name Email Phone (intl dial picker)
4
Step 4 · Business Model — Single Select, Auto-Advances
What best describes your current business model?
Selecting any option immediately advances to Step 5 — no "Next" button. All options continue, but closers prioritise DTC physical and subscription brands.
📦 DTC physical products 🔄 Subscription brand / MRR 💻 Digital / downloads / agency 🌱 Just starting out
5
Step 5 · Revenue Qualifier — Single Select, Auto-Advances
What's your current monthly revenue?
Most critical qualifying signal. Maps to the "monthly revenue" column in iClose CSV. Drives closer priority. Auto-advances on click — no Next button needed.
🐷 Under $50K/mo → POTENTIAL or DQ ⚪ $50K–$150K/mo → QUALIFIED threshold 🗄️ $150K–$500K/mo → High priority 💸 $500K–$2M/mo → Prime 💰 $2M–$5M/mo → VIP 🚀 $5M–$10M+/mo → VIP+
6
Step 6 · Ad Spend Qualifier — Single Select, Auto-Advances
How much do you spend on ads each month?
Cross-validates revenue claim. Minimum option is $10K/mo on ads — signals they're already running paid traffic. "No ads" still advances but is a yellow flag for closers.
⚡ $10K–$50K/mo 💎 $50K–$150K/mo 🏆 $150K–$500K/mo 🚀 $500K–$1M/mo 🌟 $1M+/mo ❌ We don't run any ads
7
Step 7 · Service Fit — Single Select, Auto-Advances
Do you currently need help with payment processing or merchant accounts at all?
Core product fit signal. "No" still proceeds — closer may pivot to other Apptics services. "Not sure" = education play, still valuable. All three advance.
✅ Yes, we need MIDs/payment processing ❌ No, we're good on payments ❓ Not sure, I need advice
8
Step 8 · Open Intent — Textarea, Min Length Required
What kind of help are you looking for?
"Continue" is disabled until text is entered. This populates the "specific issue?" column in the iClose CSV. Closers read this to prep their call opener. Shows up verbatim in the CRM.
Custom checkout Subscription/MRR setup Payment processor switch 3DS / chargebacks MID routing Rolling reserves
✓
Step 10 · Submission → iClose CRM
Form submitted — step=10 — page goes blank
No visible confirmation screen. URL changes to ?page=fortuze&step=10. All data lands in iClose CRM. Closer reviews the record and manually sets status. No automated booking or scheduling shown.
Record created in iClose Closer manually reviews Status applied manually
Post-Submit — Manual Qualification Paths
✓ STRATEGY_CALL_BOOKED
Revenue ≥ $50K/mo · Active Shopify brand · Payment pain (bans/holds/chargebacks) · US / Western EU / AU geography → Closer books call directly
○ QUALIFIED
Revenue $10K–$50K/mo, solid profile — closer is actively nurturing. No call booked yet. May be scheduled in a follow-up sequence.
✕ DISQUALIFIED
Revenue <$10K/mo · No US entity · Not a real merchant · MENA/APAC with no US presence · Currently banned + too early stage
– POTENTIAL
Submitted but missing key info, very early stage, or just-started brand. Held in pipeline — no immediate outreach. May be re-engaged later.
